data.body:
════════ SESSION 1 SUMMARY (comprehensive handoff, 2026-07-12) ════════
GOAL: /rebar-implement epic 9d50 (unrational-expansive-catfish) — the 2026-07-12 review-calibration follow-up. Epic grew 8->10 leaves mid-run (a37b, a8e5 added as children, both discovered_from bug 5e40).

ENV: git worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-epic-9d50, branch epic/9d50-calibration-followup, forked from origin/main 6244666e5. Local .venv (uv pip install -e '.[dev]'); commit-msg + pre-commit hooks installed. Gates ON: require_plan_review_for_claim, require_completion_verification_for_close, require_ticket_for_commit.

CLAIM PHASE — COMPLETE. All 11 tickets earned SIGNED plan-review attestations, ZERO --force. Key workflow fact discovered: plan-review attestations are UNSCOPED and pinned to the code HEAD sha — any commit stales un-claimed leaves' attestations. So the strategy is CLAIM-ALL-AT-A-FROZEN-HEAD, then implement+commit (post-claim HEAD moves are harmless). Per operator root-cause guidance, every BLOCK was a VALID, code-grounded finding; convergence came from correcting plans against ACTUAL SOURCE (not force, not iteration count): a8e5 passed once the detector identity was fixed (P5 already emits subjects; no P6 sibling-overlap detector); 74d9 once the invented scorer_args was dropped for reading the case dict directly; 9f25 once validity/priority were sourced from the sidecar decision fields; d4cf once over-engineered context-plumbing was replaced with show_ticket runtime read + AGENT_TIER-not-CODEBASE_GROUNDED. Recorded epic comments #1 (initial) + #2 (refined/authoritative: the gate is high-precision + convergent when plans are code-accurate; the novelty floor is active; the cost was agent-side plan inaccuracy, correctly caught).

IMPLEMENTATION — 8/10 committed (stack HEAD 571d2cf37, tree clean), all green via pre-commit lint+typecheck:
  0fb8d17e6 ac0e (docs: no-signature-in-ACs) ; 2e99d189e e1f2 (docs: loosen advisory-remediation mandate + sweep 2 skill copies) ; ba58b34de 74d9 (completion-verifier enumerate-all-unmet: prompt + enumerates_all_unmet_criteria eval scorer + eval case + FakeRunner plumbing test) ; 94d6f3ce6 24ec (persist completion FAIL sidecar completion_sidecar.py schema completion_verifier_fail_v1 + close-path wire; held-out oracle CAUGHT A REAL fail-closed bug — unguarded emit call-site — fixed) ; 4707cd54e f32e (code-v3 reachable_path_without_automated_coverage maint binary 0.6 + IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION bump) ; 7cd3a572e a37b (progressive_drift_refresh default False->True + doc sweep + default-on/back-out tests + measurement comment) ; 37a486899 9f25 (derive_code_review_threshold.py over 161 code_review_result_v1 findings: priority ceiling 0.60 CONFIRMED, #518 band ~0.54; PROVISIONAL 0.54, circular-proxy caveat, held-out confirmation pending; + unit test + adjudication.jsonl + recommendation.md) ; 571d2cf37 b9c0 (flip security criterion blocking_enabled=true @ 0.54; updated all 3 pinning tests to {secret-detection,high-critical-security,security}; replay test; ADR-0036 enablement note). Held-out TDD on every code leaf (RED-first, implementer held out, restored oracle, mutation/teeth). Held-out edge tests archived at ~/.claude/jobs/30a17ba2/tmp/heldout/.

REMAINING (session 2):
  1. a8e5 — Pass-2 grounding hardening (biggest; 3 components — see ticket status comment). NOT implemented.
  2. d4cf — G7 leaf-parent-containment AGENT criterion (see ticket status comment). NOT implemented.
  3. LANDING (not started): push the full stack to gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main; iterate LLM-Review + Verified; close each leaf bottom-up ONLY after its Gerrit Verified +1 (completion-verifier close gate runs on each); record epic AC2 measurement-framework comment (baseline + re-runnable queries + link deferred ticket 72b6-b0d2-2f93-456d, parked idea); close epic 9d50.
DEFERRED FOLLOW-UP created this session: 72b6-b0d2-2f93-456d (arthrodial-slate-fallowdeer, status=idea) — post-deploy field measurement, linked discovered_from 9d50.
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
